name: Mastery Golf Performance - Hilton Head Golf Lessons
address: 1533 Fording Island Rd Ste 304, Hilton Head Island, SC 29926
about: Mastery Golf Performance (MGP) is a golf training and coaching facility based in Hilton Head Island, SC. The studio utilizes advanced technology including Trackman Radar, Foresight Launch Monitor, and Flightscope Radar to provide data-driven coaching for golfers of all levels. MGP specializes in adult and junior programming, offering a structured process that begins with a new student assessment to create a customized improvement roadmap. The facility is designed for serious golfers looking to take their game to the next level with elite coaching and scientific feedback.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to industry-leading technology like Trackman and Foresight Launch Monitors
Comprehensive new student assessment providing a clear improvement roadmap
Elite coaching from nationally ranked and experienced instructors
Online training space via CoachNow for continued development

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol services mentioned, BYOB not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state whether clubs are provided or required, but as a training facility, you would likely need to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned, and there's no indication of BYOB policies at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't mention simulator course availability or typical session times, so this information isn't provided.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, MGP offers Elite Junior Academy programming and has a Director of Instruction recognized as one of the top junior coaches in the country, making it suitable for young golfers.
